summary: INVESTIGATION: LTX-2.3 i2v OOM on cloud 4090 24GB (v0.27), allocated 22.53/23.64 GiB. + slow gen (8min LTX / 2min Wan vs 20s local) + gallery blob ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND flood. Found during MPI-148 live verify; separate from the bump (Wan/PiD gen'd OK).

Pod logs pinned root cause: OOM is in ComfyUI-GGUF dequantize_blocks_BF16 (int16->int32->float32 upcast spike) at sample time, not the LTX sampler. Transformer already ~22GB partial-loaded under lowvram; dequant +576MB tips 24GB. Added TAESD-preview-None warning + blob-404 + perf as sub-items.

Pickup: root cause pinned (GGUF dequant spike, 24GB-inherent, not v0.27 regression). Plan written: decisive test = LTX i2v on 32GB 5090 (cu128) unblocks MPI-148; ranked 24GB-tier fixes (--reserve-vram, lower quant) parked as hardening.
Derived checklist from plan.md: root-cause/regression/GGUF-gating confirmed; open = user 32GB-5090 decisive test + 24GB-tier fixes + sub-issues.

SHIPPED stage-2 sigma fix 0.65->0.85: user re-exported LTX template (live node #28->sampler #39 = 0.85,0.7250,0.4219,0.0); ran generate.bat -> 8 LTX workflows fanned. Auto-verified: live 0.85 in all 8, old 0.65 = dead node #440 zero-consumers. Created validation.md. OPEN: 24GB Pod --vram-headroom=1 confirm (user-only).
Marked sigma-fix ship line complete (8 workflows regenerated + verified).

SHIPPED 24GB OOM fix: env-at-boot path dead (wrapper caches CUBRIC_VRAM_MODE in __init__:193, RunPod terminal only opens post-boot). Baked gated --vram-headroom=1 (<=24GB only, 32GB+ untouched, env still overrides) into mpi-ci start.sh; published R2 cubric-pod-runtime/vision/stable. Verified local sha 59f2e38 == manifest == live GET (13752B, flag x3). OPEN: user recreates 24GB Pod to live-confirm (must recreate, not restart-comfy).
Marked bake+R2-publish complete; pod-confirm remains open (user live op, requires Pod recreate).

DISPROVEN LIVE: --vram-headroom=1 does NOT fix the 24GB GGUF OOM. Recreated 24GB 4090 Pod, boot log confirmed flag applied (detected 23GiB, start_sha matched manifest), OOMd anyway identical numbers (alloc 22.58/req 576MiB/limit 23.64) in LTXVNormalizingSampler stage-1. Mechanism gap: headroom reserves aimdos pool, GGUF +576MB is raw torch alloc in ComfyUI-GGUF/dequant.py:62 outside aimdos fence. Local bf16 proof didnt transfer. Docs corrected. Flag still baked doing nothing -> next session revert/repoint. Escalate to real fixes: res/tier ceiling, smaller quant, bf16.
Pod-confirm box closed (DISPROVEN); added escalate-to-real-levers open item.

Reverted --vram-headroom=1 from start.sh (disproven); re-published R2 stable, live start_sha 7b91550 == local, no active vram flag (only a do-NOT-re-add NOTE comment). Back to plain-aimdo baseline. 24GB OOM remains open -> real fix next session (res/tier ceiling or smaller quant).
Approach-note added: MPI-187 cu130 finding supersedes/re-scopes this card's original approach. See top-of-description ⚠️ banner. 24GB-GGUF hardening moot -> closes via MPI-190 bf16 revert.
